# ElicitationForm.IsEnumSchema method

Returns `true` when *value* is a well-formed enum schema in any of its five forms (spec §20.4).

```csharp
public static bool IsEnumSchema(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate enum schema. |

## Return Value

`true` when a valid enum schema.
